title: AI Drives Fintech Innovation as MoneySimpler Launches AI Automated Quantitative Trading Technology
description: New York City, NY, July 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- With the rapid development of artificial intelligence (AI) technology, its applications are continuously expanding from the technology sector to multiple industries such as finance, healthcare, and manufacturing. In the financial market, AI is increasingly utilized in data analysis, risk management, strategy optimization, and automated trading, helping process massive amounts of market information and improve decision-making efficiency.

title: XRP Power Launches Advanced AI-Driven Platform Upgrades to Elevate Digital Asset Analytics and Enterprise Security
description: LONDON, United Kingdom, July 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- XRP Power, a leading global technology provider specializing in algorithmic software systems, today announced the launch of its comprehensive 2026 platform architecture upgrade. The major rollout introduces sophisticated artificial intelligence (AI) predictive models and next-generation security frameworks designed to optimize automated market analysis and safeguard user accounts across its digital infrastructure.

title: Hamilton is on the verge of a data centre moratorium vote. Others are taking notice.
description: Hamilton would join a wave of cities in the United States who have passed similar pauses for possible artificial intelligence data centres.
content:
Danielle Sheahan, a Hamilton psychotherapist, helps her clients find hope. She didn’t expect to find her own during a meeting of a little-known city committee.

title: SoftBank Group's CEO says $5 trillion a year needed globally to meet AI demand
description: Worries about a bubble in artificial intelligence investments are absurd, SoftBank Group’s CEO Masayoshi Son said Tuesday, deriding such doubts as backward and akin to questioning the use of cars and planes.
content:

title: New York won’t build big data centres for a year
description: No large data centres can be built in New York for up to a year as the state creates rules to protect the environment and its energy grid from the power-hungry facilities fueling artificial intelligence.
content:
NEW YORK — No large data centres can be built in New York for up to a year as the state creates rules to protect the environment and its energy grid from the power-hungry facilities fueling artificial intelligence.

title: powered compliance infrastructure for financial services
description: Artificial intelligence is creating a new problem for Wall Street. AI can generate emails, marketing campaigns, research, and trading activity in seconds. Compliance teams still have to review all of it. That gap is growing, and legacy compliance software was never built for this level of volume. Hadrius believes the answer is AI reviewing AI.

title: SoftBank's Son says AI will need $5 trillion per year by 2040, dismisses bubble talk
description: TOKYO — The development of artificial intelligence (AI) will require investment of $5 trillion each year by 2040, and any talk of a bubble forming around the technology is “absurd,” SoftBank Group CEO Masayoshi Son said on Tuesday.

title: APEC advisory council wants stronger AI framework
description: THE APEC Business Advisory Council (ABAC) has called for stronger artificial intelligence governance and closer regional cooperation in light of cybercriminals exploiting AI to create deepfakes, impersonate trusted individuals, and carry out more sophisticated phishing and investment scams.
